name: Robin WTF
comment: Robin WTF!™: Illuminate your beat like never before with the ultra-modern, high-energy Robe WTF!™. Whatever you call it, the Wash Twist Flash delivers turbocharged strobe, wash, and blinder effects, targeting anywhere on the stage or into audience, built for any environment. Get ready to elevate your show with unmatched brilliance and intensity!

capabilities.comment: Quiet mode: Fans ON at blackout
Quiet mode: Fans OFF at blackout
